title: potentilla gordonii var. wasatchensis
intro: Potentilla gordonii var. wasatchensis, also known as Wasatch Cinquefoil, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Potentilla gordonii var. wasatchensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
